Step1: Create a ComputeBackendBucket and a ComputeBackendBucketSignedURLKey whose key value is read from a Kubernetes Secret via keyValue.valueFrom.secretKeyRef. Verifies fix for backendBucketRef.name resolution (TF controller emitted "referenced resource's target field name is unsupported") and for the GCP "key already exists" error on controller restart caused by missing Terraform import support.
